implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for ATM: A checking-account and a saving-account
The system shall ensure efficiency (resource utilization): If the saving-account balance is insufficient to cover the requested withdrawal amount, the application should inform...
The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): For each checking account, one related saving-account can exists
The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): Neither a checking-account nor a saving-account can have a negative balance
The system shall ensure sustainability (environmental impact awareness): Each transaction must be recorded, and the client must have the ability to review all transactions perfo...
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): A bank client can have two types of accounts
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (auditability): Recorded transactions must include the date, time, transaction type, amount and account balance after the transaction
